info.title: Elvanto API
info.description: Elvanto church management API for managing people, groups, services, songs, calendar events, people flows, and financial transactions.

post.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all people in the account.

fields.description: Optional custom fields to retrieve (e.g. gender, birthday, locations).

post.description: Find one or more people matching a specific search query.
Find a person based on their ID.
Create a new person in the account.
Update details of an existing person.

id.description: UUID of the person to edit.

post.description: Remove a person from the account.

id.description: UUID of the person to delete.

post.description: Retrieve information of the logged-in OAuth user.
Retrieve a list of all people categories.
Retrieve a list of all custom fields for people.
Retrieve all people flows in the account.
Retrieve all steps within a people flow, including instructions and descriptions.

post.summary: List people in a flow step
post.description: Retrieve members within a specific people flow step.

post.summary: Add person to a flow step
post.description: Add a person to a specific people flow step.
Retrieve a list of all groups.
Find a group based on its ID.
Create a new group in the account.
Edit an existing group.
Remove a group from the account.
Add a person to a group.
Remove a person from a group.
Retrieve a list of services.
Find a service based on its ID.
Retrieve a list of songs.
Find a song based on its ID.
Create a new song in the account.
Edit an existing song.
Retrieve a list of all song categories.

post.summary: Get all arrangements for a song
post.description: Retrieve a list of arrangements within a song.
Find an arrangement based on its ID.
Create a new arrangement tied to a specified song.
Edit an existing arrangement's details.

post.summary: Get all keys for an arrangement
post.description: Retrieve a list of keys within an arrangement.
Find a key based on its ID.

post.summary: Create a key for an arrangement
post.description: Create a new key attached to a specified arrangement.
Edit an existing key's details.
Retrieve a list of all calendars that events can be assigned to.
Retrieve a list of all events between two dates.
Create a new calendar event.

calendar_id.description: Calendar UUID to assign the event to.

post.description: Edit an existing calendar event.
Remove a calendar event.
Retrieve a list of all transactions between two dates.
Find a transaction based on its ID.
Create a new financial transaction.

person_id.description: Person UUID associated with the transaction.

post.description: Edit an existing financial transaction.
Remove a financial transaction.
Retrieve a list of all chart of accounts categories.
Create a new category in the chart of accounts.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth2 Bearer token. Obtain via OAuth2 authorization flow.

basicAuth.description: API key as username with blank password via HTTP Basic Authentication.

family_id.description: Family ID or 'new' to create a new family.

fields.description: Custom fields (gender, birthday, anniversary, marital_status, access_permissions).
